testcase.name: Given user is on the webcast page
testcase.system-out: browser value = chrome Initiated instance Processing... Please wait Self healing process started
testcase.system-err: Apr 13, 2026 4:57:16 PM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 147 Apr 13, 2026 4:57:16 PM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$5 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 147.0.7727.56. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.14.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.

testcase.name: And user click on login button
Then verify user login
